title: MCP Servers
description: The <0>Model Context Protocol</0> enables communication with locally running MCP servers that provide additional tools and resources to extend C's capabilities. You can use <1>community-made servers</1> or ask C to create new tools specific to your workflow (e.g., "add a tool that gets the latest npm docs").

enableToggle.title: Enable MCP Servers
enableToggle.description: Turn this ON to let C use tools from connected MCP servers. This gives C more capabilities. If you don't plan to use these extra tools, turn it OFF to help reduce API token costs.

enableServerCreation.title: Enable MCP Server Creation
enableServerCreation.description: Enable this to have C help you build <1>new</1> custom MCP servers. <0>Learn about server creation</0>
enableServerCreation.hint: Hint: To reduce API token costs, disable this setting when you are not actively asking C to create a new MCP server.

learnMoreEditingSettings: Learn more about editing MCP settings files

networkTimeout.label: Network Timeout
networkTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for server responses

deleteDialog.title: Delete MCP Server
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the MCP server "{{serverName}}"? This action cannot be undone.

marketplace.title: MCP Marketplace
marketplace.description: Choose a trusted MCP server and let C set it up in a new task.
